title: narcissus × incomparabilis var. albidus
intro: Narcissus × incomparabilis var. albidus, commonly known as the white incomparable narcissus or white Persian narcissus, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant contains a compound called galantamine, which has been used medicinally for its potential to inhibit the breakdown of acetylcholine in the brain, thereby improving cognitive function and memory. The health benefits of this plant include improved memory, reduced risk of dementia and Alzheimer's disease, and potential anti-inflammatory properties. The galantamine found in Narcissus × incomparabilis var. albidus is often extracted and used in herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
